rationale: The citing paper uses Grewal, Chandrashekaran, and Citrin (2010) to justify core theoretical links in its framework, especially that customer satisfaction is an asset tied to firm value and risk outcomes. It cites this work when motivating the joint study of service innovativeness, customer satisfaction, and shareholder-value consequences, and again in the discussion of satisfaction-risk effects. Although the citation appears with other references, it supports central model paths rather than a peripheral mention.
relation_description: The citing study treats the cited paper as prior evidence for the customer satisfaction-shareholder value/risk relationship and builds its conceptual model around that premise. It then adds service innovativeness (e- and p-) as upstream drivers and tests direct and mediated effects on value and risk.
